analysis.consistency: High. The components, casting time, and effect duration are standard for a mid-level utility transmutation spell.
analysis.quality: Good. The description clearly outlines the limits (Medium size or 5ft cube, max 2 hinges/latch for doors) and provides useful examples.

mechanics.limitations: Object size/volume constraint (Medium or 5ft cube), complexity limit on mechanical features (hinges/latch only).
mechanics.action_economy: 1 action, Instantaneous duration suggests immediate effect upon casting.
mechanics.material_component_use: The material component (soft clay worked into the desired shape) is thematic and consumed/used in the shaping process, which is appropriate for a shaping spell.

suggested_improvements: No critical improvements needed. The spell is well-defined for its purpose.
